creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text: I did not update it to 2.0.0 yet because Rails and some other ports require 1.x, for example, activesupport wants tzinfo ~> 1.1. I've considered updating rubygem-tzinfo to 2.0.0 and keep the old version as rubygem-tzinfo1. But it needs testing to ensure that dependent ports won't break.
